title: senecio boutonii
intro: Senecio boutonii, also known as the Button Plant, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to South Africa. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of the plant have been used in herbal medicine, containing a variety of bioactive compounds, including pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, and has been reported to have potential benefits in reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting liver health. In herbal preparations, Senecio boutonii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
